known_issues: Settings page throws 'Unauthorized: Only users can access settings' error when loading — likely a missing or incorrect auth context when fetching settings

existing_features.title: Fix the Settings page so that it does not attempt to load settings when the user is not authenticated. If the user is not logged in, show a prompt to log in rather than calling the backend settings endpoint, which currently throws 'Unauthorized: Only users can access settings'.

Fix the useAccountSettings hook to guard all backend calls with an authentication check. Only invoke backend settings queries and mutations when a valid session/actor is available; return appropriate idle/unauthenticated state otherwise.

projectName: Fix 'Unauthorized: Only users can access settings' error on Settings page
